feedback_capture_template.title: Reviewer notes source
feedback_capture_template.prompt: Identify the human-filled decision log or reviewer note document that follow-ups come from.

feedback_capture_template.title: Public/private boundary finding
feedback_capture_template.prompt: Capture any public/private-boundary issue, redaction concern, or missing evidence noted by the reviewer.

feedback_capture_template.title: Publication boundary finding
feedback_capture_template.prompt: Capture any concern about publication commands, credential checks, remote mutation, or release approval wording.

feedback_capture_template.title: External-reader usability follow-up
feedback_capture_template.prompt: Capture confusing first-10-minutes navigation, docs, demo-pack, or packet-index feedback.

feedback_capture_template.title: Follow-up backlog entry
feedback_capture_template.prompt: Draft a local backlog/issue entry for each reviewed follow-up; do not create remote issues automatically.

follow_up_backlog_drafts.title: Public/private boundary follow-up draft
follow_up_backlog_drafts.suggested_local_backlog_text: Review and address any external reviewer public/private-boundary or redaction findings before publication.

follow_up_backlog_drafts.title: Publication boundary follow-up draft
follow_up_backlog_drafts.suggested_local_backlog_text: Review and address any external reviewer concerns about commands, credentials, remote mutation, upload, or release approval wording.

follow_up_backlog_drafts.title: First-10-minutes usability follow-up draft
follow_up_backlog_drafts.suggested_local_backlog_text: Improve README/thesis/demo-pack/packet-index navigation based on external reviewer first-10-minutes notes.

checks.name: docs:release-plan-documents-external-reviewer-feedback-plan
checks.detail: docs/open-source-release-plan.md documents external reviewer feedback plan and report-only/non-approval boundary.

checks.name: roadmap:phase85-documented
checks.detail: docs/public-roadmap.md records Phase 85 external reviewer feedback plan scope.

review_boundary: This external reviewer feedback plan is a report-only local capture/import plan for human notes; it is not release approval.

It can guide local follow-up/backlog drafts, but it does not mutate issues, publish, push, commit, create remotes/repositories/tags/releases, upload artifacts, call provider APIs, validate credentials, execute hooks/actions/commands, or mutate runtime/admin/provider state.
Any actual issue creation, backlog mutation, go/no-go decision, or real release action remains a separate explicit human operation outside this gate.
recommendations: Use this report to convert human reviewer notes into local follow-up drafts only; it does not create remote issues or mutate a backlog automatically.
If status is blocked, regenerate the quickstart/decision-log evidence and rerun --external-reviewer-feedback-plan --both.

Keep publication, credential validation, issue mutation, remote creation, tag creation, release creation, push, provider/API actions, command execution, and final go/no-go decisions outside this report-only gate.

public_snapshot_notice.message: latest-external-reviewer-feedback-plan.json is a static sanitized snapshot copied into a public artifact; it is not live GitHub state and may describe the staging context at generation time. Regenerate local report-only gates for current status.
